figures.caption: Figure 1: An example of temporal reasoning in question answering.

Table 2: Main results using different models and strategies. We report exact match (EM) and token-level F1 scores. In line with previous work, we randomly sampled 1,000 examples under each task. Results with ∗ are averaged over three random runs (p < 0.05 under t-test). The last two columns show average scores across four tasks, and their absolute improvements over the corresponding ICL baselines. Results with † are reported in the original papers.
Table 9: Case study demonstrating temporal reasoning using the AdapTime framework.
Table 3: Ablation study on DeepSeek-V3. All metrics are reported as percentages.
